input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.10.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.10.3.2
            TITLE: off course (oc)

            CONTENT:
            rule D.10.3.2: Off Course (OC)
D.10.3.2 Off Course (OC) 
DNF for that run.  Vehicles that stall or spin out may continue if they have not gone Off 
Course.

final_answer: rule D.10.3.2: Off Course (OC) D.10.3.2 Off Course (OC) DNF for that run. Vehicles that stall or spin out may continue if they have not gone Off Course.
